name: Taco Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (1.25 oz ea) taco seasoning mix
16 ounces sour cream mixed with 1 tbsp chili powder
3 cups Monterey jack cheese, divided, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large saucepan, cook beef until brown and drain well.
3. Add taco seasoning, garlic, cayenne pepper, and water. Simmer uncovered for 10 minutes. Set aside.
4. Sprinkle cornmeal in the bottom of a 9" x 13" baking dish.
5. Place 6 tortillas in the pan, overlapping slightly and extending up the edges.
6. Layer in the following order:
- I cup salsa
- 1/2 of meat mixture (about 2 cups)
- 1/2 cup green onions
- 1 cup sour cream mixture
- 2 cups combined cheeses
7. Repeat starting again with 6 tortillas, salsa, meat, green onions, sour cream, and 2 cups of cheese.
8. Place 6 tortillas and remaining salsa on top.
9. Bake for 40 minutes. Remove from oven and sprinkle with remaining cheese.
10. Return to oven and bake an additional 10 minutes or until cheese is melted. Let stand 10 minutes before serving.
11. Yield: 10-12 servings.
